creativeCodingConcepts.name: Simple Drawing
creativeCodingConcepts.description: Creating fundamental visual elements like circles, rectangles, and lines
expressionGoals: Understanding the canvas as a creative space

creativeCodingConcepts.name: Colors and Palettes
creativeCodingConcepts.description: Using numeric definitions for colors to create precise hues

creativeCodingConcepts.name: Variables
expressionGoals: Understanding change as an expressive element

creativeCodingConcepts.name: Visual Decision Making
creativeCodingConcepts.description: Creating different visuals based on conditions
expressionGoals: Creating works that change and adapt

creativeCodingConcepts.name: Creative Randomness
creativeCodingConcepts.description: Using chance to create organic variety and spontaneity

creativeCodingConcepts.name: User Interaction
creativeCodingConcepts.description: Making art that responds to the viewer
expressionGoals: Creating dialogue between artwork and viewer
Designing experiences rather than static pieces

creativeCodingConcepts.name: Patterns and Repetition
creativeCodingConcepts.description: Creating complex visuals through repeated elements
expressionGoals: Finding beauty in repetition and variation
Creating complex outputs from simple rules

creativeCodingConcepts.name: Reusable Drawing Functions
creativeCodingConcepts.description: Creating modular, reusable elements for complex compositions
expressionGoals: Building a personal library of visual elements
Creating complex scenes from modular parts

creativeCodingConcepts.name: Custom Shapes and Drawing
creativeCodingConcepts.description: Creating your own visual elements beyond basic shapes

creativeCodingConcepts.name: Visual Transformations
creativeCodingConcepts.description: Manipulating elements with rotation, scaling, and translation

creativeCodingConcepts.name: Visual Collections
creativeCodingConcepts.description: Managing multiple elements as unified groups

selfExpression.description: Creating art that expresses personal emotions, ideas, or identity
projectIdeas: Interactive self-portrait that changes with mouse movement
Emotional landscape that reflects different moods
Visual diary that generates unique patterns each day

visualStorytelling.description: Using code to tell stories or narratives
projectIdeas: Animated character that responds to environment
Generative comic strip with variable elements

environmentalAwareness.description: Creating works that connect to nature or environmental themes
projectIdeas: Weather-responsive landscape that changes with real data
Growing plant system that responds to user care

socialConnection.description: Art that facilitates connection or communication
projectIdeas: Visual chat system where messages become part of a composition
Emotion translator that converts text to visual expression

visualExploration.description: Exploring visual concepts and aesthetics for their own sake
projectIdeas: Visual music interpreter that translates sound to image

learningObjectives.name: Named color fill
learningObjectives.description: Setting the fill color for shapes using CSS color names

learningObjectives.name: Named color stroke
learningObjectives.description: Setting the outline color for shapes using CSS color names

learningObjectives.name: Named color background
learningObjectives.description: Setting the background using CSS color names

learningObjectives.name: Triangle
signatures: triangle(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3)
examples: triangle(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3)

learningObjectives.name: Quad
signatures: quad(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3, x4, y4)
examples: quad(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3, x4, y4)

learningObjectives.name: Stroke weight
learningObjectives.description: Setting the thickness of lines and outlines

learningObjectives.name: Rectangle mode
learningObjectives.description: Changing how rectangle coordinates are interpreted (CENTER, CORNER, etc.)

learningObjectives.name: Ellipse mode
learningObjectives.description: Changing how ellipse coordinates are interpreted (CENTER, RADIUS, etc.)

learningObjectives.name: Fill
learningObjectives.description: Setting the fill color for shapes

learningObjectives.name: Stroke
learningObjectives.description: Setting the outline color for shapes

learningObjectives.name: Alpha channel
signatures: fill(r, g, b, a), stroke(r, g, b, a), background(r, g, b, a)

learningObjectives.name: Clear
learningObjectives.description: Clearing specific portions of the canvas

learningObjectives.name: Erase mode
learningObjectives.description: Erasing portions of already drawn elements

learningObjectives.name: Blend mode
learningObjectives.description: Controlling how colors blend when layered

learningObjectives.name: Multiple conditions
learningObjectives.description: Making complex visual decisions with multiple outcomes

learningObjectives.name: Random
learningObjectives.description: Generating random values within a range

learningObjectives.name: Perlin noise
signatures: noise(x), noise(x, y), noise(x, y, z)

learningObjectives.name: Milliseconds
learningObjectives.description: Getting elapsed time for precise timing

learningObjectives.name: Mouse button state
learningObjectives.description: Detecting if mouse button is down

learningObjectives.name: Key state
learningObjectives.description: Detecting if any key is pressed

learningObjectives.name: Current key
learningObjectives.description: Identifying which key is being pressed

learningObjectives.name: Key code
learningObjectives.description: Reading special keys like arrows and modifiers

learningObjectives.name: Nested loops
signatures: for (let x = 0; x < width; x += 10) { for (let y = 0; y < height; y += 10) { } }

learningObjectives.name: Function calls
learningObjectives.description: Using custom functions to create repeated elements

learningObjectives.name: Bezier vertex
signatures: bezierVertex(x2, y2, x3, y3, x4, y4)
examples: bezierVertex(x2, y2, x3, y3, x4, y4)

learningObjectives.name: Arc
signatures: arc(x, y, w, h, start, stop)
examples: arc(x, y, w, h, start, stop)

learningObjectives.name: Array access
learningObjectives.description: Accessing individual elements in a collection

learningObjectives.name: Array iteration
learningObjectives.description: Working with all elements in a collection

learningObjectives.name: Array of objects
learningObjectives.description: Creating collections of complex visual elements
